title: Verify Visualization Runtime Build Artifacts
forbids: running MapGen visualization or diagnostics without the required runtime dist artifacts
why: The browser/diagnostic runtime imports built adapter, MapGen core, and viz packages; missing dist artifacts fail late unless preflight owns the capability.
remediate: Run the preflight or build civ7-adapter, mapgen-viz, and mapgen-core.
message: MapGen visualization runtime dependencies must exist before diagnostics or Studio worker use.
